programme.desc: S1 E40 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.desc: S1 E807 Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

programme.desc: S1 E5177 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E55 Upon tasting Sandhya's cooking, an impressed Bhabho presents her with a silver vessel. In the meantime, Chotu finds a box in the shop and brings it back home.
programme.title: Diya Aur Baati Hum

programme.desc: S1 E27 Gopi and Rashi, cousins, are married into the same wealthy family. As they strive to cope with family relations, they also attempt to become better versions of themselves.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E169 Shaurya avoids returning home upon hearing about Varsha's mother's visit. Meanwhile, Naitik is overjoyed when Akshara chooses to delay her trip to her mother's house.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
